# Flipick

> Flipick is a learning-technology company founded in 2011 by Ravi Dugal, based in Pune, India. The platform serves 150,000+ active learners across enterprise clients including Pearson, IIBF, Godrej, Jindal Steel, IFC World Bank Group, and IICA.

## Products

### AI Video Platform (Flagship)
Studio-grade AI video creation for L&D, marketing and customer teams. Create, personalise and distribute video — end to end.
- Screenplay Creator and storyboard approval before rendering
- Consistent characters and products across scenes
- Variable Video Production (VVP): one master film, hundreds of personalised variants
- Authenticated viewer tracking, completion and CTA analytics
- Credit-based pricing: 1 credit = ₹1, base rate 3,300 credits per finished minute
- URL: https://flipick.com/AI-video-platform

### Flipick LMS G2
AI skills-development platform covering the full learning lifecycle — content creation, engagement, adaptive assessment and analytics.
- Zero-hallucination RAG assistant with source citations
- GMAT-style adaptive assessments
- Singapore Skills Framework integration for role-aligned learning
- AI-powered course and question-bank generation
- Talent-gap analytics and role-migration planning
- URL: https://flipick.com/lms

### PowerPoint to SCORM
Converts existing PowerPoint decks into fully animated, narrated, assessed, SCORM-ready eLearning courses in approximately 15 days.
- Input: PPT/PPTX, PDF, Word documents
- Output: SCORM 1.2, MP4, xAPI reporting, LTI integration
- Zero hallucination: every element derived from source documents, human-reviewed
- Essentials from ₹1,50,000; Professional ₹2,50,000–₹4,00,000
- URL: https://flipick.com/ppt-to-scorm

## Pricing
Credit-based, transparent pricing across both AI Video Creation and VVP Distribution.
- 1 credit = ₹1
- AI Video Creation: 3,300 credits/min base; typical 5,000–5,500/min with moderate edits
- VVP Distribution: 50 credits/recipient (under 100) down to 20/recipient (10,000+)
- No seats, no subscriptions
- URL: https://flipick.com/pricing
